name: Green Garlic Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into slices or 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a skillet and cook beef until well-done and tender.
3. Separate bulbs into cloves and peel them.
4. Place whole cloves in the skillet and cook until tender.
5. Add green chiles and onions to the skillet.
6. Dice green tomatoes and add them to the skillet as well.
7. Add the remainder of the seasonings (salt and white pepper).
8. Cook, covered, to retain as much juice as possible.
